results.rendered_html:
āhara (von) har mit ā
1〉 adj. der herbeizutragen pflegt, am Ende eines comp.  P. 3,2,11 . puṣpā˚, phalā˚ Sch. samitkuśaphalāharaiḥ  RAGH. 1,49 . Vgl. āhāra.
— 2〉 m. Zustandebringung, Vollbringung (eines Opfers): rājasūyo durāharaḥ  MBH. 2,664 .
— 3〉 das Einathmen, die eingeathmete Luft  H. 1368 .

results.rendered_html:
āhara a. (At the end of comp.) Bringing, fetching, taking, seizing; samitkuśaphalāharaiḥ  R. 1. 49. 
— raḥ
1 Taking, seizing.
2 Accomplishing, performing.
3 Offering a sacrifice.
4 Drawing in breath, inhaling.
5 The air so inhaled.
6 Inspiration, breath inspired.
Comp.
— karaṭā,
(pb)
— celā, -nivapā, -niṣkirā, -vasanā,
— vitanā, -senā compounds of the class called mayūravyaṃsakādi.
